name: Panel From Outline and Thickness
description: Creates a Panel from a Polyline and Thickness.

inputParameters.name: outline
inputParameters.description: Referenced polyline, Guid of polyline in the active Rhino document.

inputParameters.name: vector
inputParameters.description: Determines direction of the panel extrusion

inputParameters.name: openings
inputParameters.description: List of openings in the panel.

inputParameters.name: layers
inputParameters.description: (Optional) Layer definitions from CT_Panel_Layer_Definition. When provided, creates bound panel layers from the defs.

inputParameters.name: identify_doors
inputParameters.description: If True, openings that reach the bottom edge of the panel are classified as doors.

inputParameters.name: updateRefObj
inputParameters.description: (optional) If True, the attributes in the referenced object will be updated/overwritten with the new values given here.
